---
kind: task_template
name: Weekly Self-Improvement Review
description: Weekly ranking of process-surface opportunities, experiment results, and promotion decisions across the studio
schema: agentcompanies/v1
assignee: chief-of-staff
project: studio-os
recurring: true
---

Review once per week:

- company-world-model deltas
- customer-world-model deltas
- agent self-reviews
- completed experiment records
- open rollout rings
- rollback candidates

## Required Output

Leave behind:

- one ranked self-improvement backlog
- one promotion decision for each completed experiment
- one escalation packet for any human-boundary case
